summary: Anthropic @AnthropicAI · 6月11日 We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program matching people early in their careers with US nonprofits. We'll teach 1,000 people to use Claude, and pay them to use AI to advance their hosts’ missions. Claude Corps 来自 anthropic.com 584 946 6,969 103万
